mapper.sql: u.user_id, u.username, u.display_name, u.email, u.password_hash, u.role, u.status, u.bio, u.avatar_url, u.banner_url, u.community_level, u.experience_points, u.last_login_reward_date, u.reputation_score, u.created_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE author_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'VISIBLE'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(like_count), 0) FROM posts WHERE author_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows WHERE following_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follows a JOIN user_follows b ON b.follower_id = a.following_id AND b.following_id = a.follower_id AND b.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE a.follower_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friendships WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND (user_low_id = #{userId} OR user_high_id = #{userId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follows ( follower_id, following_id, status ) VALUES ( #{followerId}, #{followingId}, 'ACTIVE' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'ACTIVE', created_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_follows f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = f.follower_id WHERE f.following_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY f.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM user_follows f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = f.following_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY f.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM friendships fs JOIN users u ON u.user_id = CASE WHEN fs.user_low_id = #{userId} THEN fs.user_high_id ELSE fs.user_low_id END WHERE fs.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (fs.user_low_id = #{userId} OR fs.user_high_id = #{userId}) AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY fs.updated_time DESC, fs.created_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CONVERT(CONCAT('post:', p.post_id) USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS activityKey, CONVERT('POST_PUBLISHED' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS activityType, CONVERT('POST' USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS targetType, p.post_id AS targetId, p.post_id AS postId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS helpId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS commentId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS answerId, CONVERT(COALESCE(requested.title, fallback.title, '') USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS title, CONVERT(COALESCE(requested.summary, fallback.summary, '') USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS summary, CONVERT(CAST(NULL AS CHAR) USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS content, CONVERT(COALESCE(requested.language_code, fallback.language_code, p.original_language) USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS languageCode, CONVERT(COALESCE(cat.category_code, '') USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS categoryCode, CONVERT(p.cover_image_url USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS coverImageUrl, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.created_time AS createdTime FROM posts p LEFT JOIN post_i18n requested ON requested.post_id = p.post_id AND requested.language_code = #{languageCode} LEFT JOIN post_i18n fallback ON fallback.post_id = p.post_id AND fallback.language_code = p.original_language LEFT JOIN categories cat ON cat.category_id = p.category_id WHERE p.author_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('help:', h.help_id) AS activityKey, 'HELP_ASKED' AS activityType, 'HELP' AS targetType, h.help_id AS targetId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS postId, h.help_id AS helpId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS commentId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS answerId, h.title AS title, h.description AS summary, CAST(NULL AS CHAR) AS content, '' AS languageCode, COALESCE(cat.category_code, '') AS categoryCode, CAST(NULL AS CHAR) AS coverImageUrl, 0 AS likeCount, 0 AS favoriteCount, 0 AS commentCount, 0 AS viewCount, h.created_time AS createdTime FROM help_requests h LEFT JOIN categories cat ON cat.category_id = h.category_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId}
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('answer:', ha.answer_id) AS activityKey, 'HELP_ANSWERED' AS activityType, 'HELP' AS targetType, h.help_id AS targetId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS postId, h.help_id AS helpId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS commentId, ha.answer_id AS answerId, h.title AS title, h.description AS summary, ha.content AS content, '' AS languageCode, COALESCE(cat.category_code, '') AS categoryCode, CAST(NULL AS CHAR) AS coverImageUrl, 0 AS likeCount, 0 AS favoriteCount, 0 AS commentCount, 0 AS viewCount, ha.created_time AS createdTime FROM help_answers ha JOIN help_requests h ON h.help_id = ha.help_id LEFT JOIN categories cat ON cat.category_id = h.category_id WHERE ha.user_id = #{userId} AND ha.status = 'VISIBLE'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('comment:', cm.comment_id) AS activityKey, 'COMMENTED' AS activityType, 'POST' AS targetType, p.post_id AS targetId, p.post_id AS postId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS helpId, cm.comment_id AS commentId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS answerId, COALESCE(requested.title, fallback.title, '') AS title, COALESCE(requested.summary, fallback.summary, '') AS summary, cm.content AS content, COALESCE(requested.language_code, fallback.language_code, p.original_language) AS languageCode, COALESCE(cat.category_code, '') AS categoryCode, p.cover_image_url AS coverImageUrl, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, cm.created_time AS createdTime FROM comments cm JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = cm.post_id LEFT JOIN post_i18n requested ON requested.post_id = p.post_id AND requested.language_code = #{languageCode} LEFT JOIN post_i18n fallback ON fallback.post_id = p.post_id AND fallback.language_code = p.original_language LEFT JOIN categories cat ON cat.category_id = p.category_id WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.status = 'VISIBLE' AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('like:', pl.like_id) AS activityKey, 'LIKED_POST' AS activityType, 'POST' AS targetType, p.post_id AS targetId, p.post_id AS postId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS helpId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS commentId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS answerId, COALESCE(requested.title, fallback.title, '') AS title, COALESCE(requested.summary, fallback.summary, '') AS summary, CAST(NULL AS CHAR) AS content, COALESCE(requested.language_code, fallback.language_code, p.original_language) AS languageCode, COALESCE(cat.category_code, '') AS categoryCode, p.cover_image_url AS coverImageUrl, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, pl.created_time AS createdTime FROM post_likes pl JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = pl.post_id LEFT JOIN post_i18n requested ON requested.post_id = p.post_id AND requested.language_code = #{languageCode} LEFT JOIN post_i18n fallback ON fallback.post_id = p.post_id AND fallback.language_code = p.original_language LEFT JOIN categories cat ON cat.category_id = p.category_id WHERE pl.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT('favorite:', pf.favorite_id) AS activityKey, 'FAVORITED_POST' AS activityType, 'POST' AS targetType, p.post_id AS targetId, p.post_id AS postId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS helpId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS commentId, CAST(NULL AS UNSIGNED) AS answerId, COALESCE(requested.title, fallback.title, '') AS title, COALESCE(requested.summary, fallback.summary, '') AS summary, CAST(NULL AS CHAR) AS content, COALESCE(requested.language_code, fallback.language_code, p.original_language) AS languageCode, COALESCE(cat.category_code, '') AS categoryCode, p.cover_image_url AS coverImageUrl, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.view_count AS viewCount, pf.created_time AS createdTime FROM post_favorites pf JOIN posts p ON p.post_id = pf.post_id LEFT JOIN post_i18n requested ON requested.post_id = p.post_id AND requested.language_code = #{languageCode} LEFT JOIN post_i18n fallback ON fallback.post_id = p.post_id AND fallback.language_code = p.original_language LEFT JOIN categories cat ON cat.category_id = p.category_id WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' ) user_activity ORDER BY createdTime DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friendships ( user_low_id, user_high_id, status ) VALUES ( #{userLowId}, #{userHighId}, 'ACTIVE' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 'ACTIVE', updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO friend_requests ( requester_id, addressee_id, message, status ) VALUES ( #{requesterId}, #{addresseeId}, #{message}, 'PENDING' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE message = VALUES(message), status = 'PENDING', processed_time = NULL, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.sql: fr.request_id AS requestId, fr.requester_id AS requesterId, requester.username AS requesterUsername, COALESCE(NULLIF(requester.display_name, ''), requester.username) AS requesterDisplayName, requester.avatar_url AS requesterAvatarUrl, requester.community_level AS requesterCommunityLevel, requester.bio AS requesterBio, fr.addressee_id AS addresseeId, addressee.username AS addresseeUsername, COALESCE(NULLIF(addressee.display_name, ''), addressee.username) AS addresseeDisplayName, addressee.avatar_url AS addresseeAvatarUrl, addressee.community_level AS addresseeCommunityLevel, addressee.bio AS addresseeBio, fr.message AS message, fr.status AS status, fr.created_time AS createdTime, fr.processed_time AS processedTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM friend_requests fr JOIN users requester ON requester.user_id = fr.requester_id JOIN users addressee ON addressee.user_id = fr.addressee_id WHERE fr.request_id = #{requestId}

SELECT
FROM friend_requests fr JOIN users requester ON requester.user_id = fr.requester_id JOIN users addressee ON addressee.user_id = fr.addressee_id WHERE fr.requester_id = #{requesterId} AND fr.addressee_id = #{addresseeId} AND fr.status = 'PENDING' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_requests SET status = #{status}, processed_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE request_id = #{requestId}
mapper.select: SELECT fm.message_id AS messageId, fm.sender_id AS senderId, sender.username AS senderUsername, COALESCE(NULLIF(sender.display_name, ''), sender.username) AS senderDisplayName, sender.avatar_url AS senderAvatarUrl, fm.receiver_id AS receiverId, receiver.username AS receiverUsername, COALESCE(NULLIF(receiver.display_name, ''), receiver.username) AS receiverDisplayName, receiver.avatar_url AS receiverAvatarUrl, fm.content AS content, fm.read_flag AS readFlag, fm.created_time AS createdTime FROM friend_messages fm JOIN users sender ON sender.user_id = fm.sender_id JOIN users receiver ON receiver.user_id = fm.receiver_id WHERE ( fm.sender_id = #{userId} AND fm.receiver_id = #{friendId} ) OR ( fm.sender_id = #{friendId} AND fm.receiver_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY fm.created_time DESC, fm.message_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
